elements.name: Title
texts: "The lake waves caught the concrete stilts of the Basilica"

elements.name: Description
texts: The poetry of Patrick Kavanagh's 'Lough Derg', detailing a visit in 1941

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts:
“The lake waves caught the concrete stilts of the Basilica
That spread like a bulldog’s hind paws. A Leitrim man
With a face as sad as a flooded hay-field,
Leaned in an angle of the walls with his rosary beads in his hands.”
